dialogos.texto_en: (As a result of hearing everyone's thoughts,\n in the end it was decided\n that Yotsuba and I could do as we please.)
(Then, Yotsuba expressed her desire\n to see fish up close,\n so we tried some easy snorkeling.)
(Facing the colorful fish swimming in the sea,\n we all had a great time\n and fully enjoyed our short underwater walk.)
Great job, everyone!
There were so many beautiful fish, weren't there.
Yes, I never thought we could see fish so close up.
I wonder if they're used to humans.\nThey didn't seem to run away, even when we got close.
Hey, Yotsuba, have you decided what to do next?
Ah, yep!\nHow about flyboarding?
Flyboarding? Again, you go with something flashy.
What's flyboarding?
It's where water spurts out from the board,\ncausing it to hover!
Huh?
This is hard to explain.\nNino, can you help out?
WHA?!\nUmmm...
It's like standing on a board with a device that\nshoots out jets, and the water pressure lets you\nhover. It's like skateboarding in the air, I guess?
What?! That sounds like SO much fun!!
But Yotsuba, isn't it difficult?\nIt might be tough for Miku and Raiha-chan.
Yeah...\nActually, I'd like to rest a little...
Yotsuba, If we're going to do an activity,\nit's best if everyone participates.
Oh yes, you're right, it's always better\nto do things together as a group.
Well, I'm still feeling energized,\nso I think I'll swim a bit more.
Ah, me too!
I'll go too.\nWhat are you gonna do, Fu-kun?
...I'm gonna take a break, too.
Ahaha, there's no need to be embarrassed.\nLeave Raiha-chan to me.
Alright, she's yours.
What about you, Itsuki?
I'll take a break too.
Got it! Okay, we're off!
Oh! Raiha's coming out of the sea!
This is the perfect photo opportunity!
Itsuki, can you take a good shot\nand give me the data later?
Well, may I bill you for it?
I think I'll break even,\nonce you factor in Raiha's modeling fee.
Hm? What's up, Miku?
No, it's nothing.
Teehee, it really looks like you're having fun.\nI'm glad we invited Raiha-chan.
It's not every day we get to have\nan experience like this. When was the last time\nwe saw Raiha this excited...!
